snippet.title: Equine Wellness Academy
snippet.description:
Practical horse health education for owners, barn managers, and equine professionals. New videos every Monday and Thursday.

Topics: Skin conditions, lameness, nutrition, dental care, emergency first aid, seasonal management, and preventive care.

Business inquiries: equinewellnessacademy@gmail.com
